feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Antman and Red reached Celadon Rocket Hideout B1F.

feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Red took point at the first spinner maze and warned that Rocket built B1F to separate partners.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill traced the Silph Scope machine pattern through the B1F equipment bank.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Rocket's spinner maze has been mapped as the first real Celadon hideout dungeon hazard.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Team Gold Dust has infiltrated Rocket's hideout, hunting for a hidden coin cache and stolen relic ledger.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Team Moonlight signal bleed is interfering with Rocket's maze controls.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: The Lift Key trail continues below B1F instead of resolving on the first hideout floor.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Rocket Hideout B2F is unlocked as the next dungeon step.
